rulings.Case Title: KELLY KIMBALL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 30, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANTs XELAN PROP 1, LLC and ANNA KIHAGI's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to causes of action for declaratory relief, negligence, IIED, negligent misrepresentation, intentional misrepresentation and wrongful eviction. All of these causes of action are based on the alleged violation of the ordinance and are subject to 1-year SOL. Plaintiff shall have 10 days to amend to allege: (1) facts, not conclusions, supporting tolling or delayed discovery; OR (2) re-allege these causes of action based on facts not arising out of violation of SFRO. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to Negligence cause of action. This cause of action, in part, also arises out of events occurring during Plaintiff's tenancy (independent from the OMI). Plaintiff shall have 10 days to amend the complaint and allege facts (not conclusions) supporting tolling or delayed discovery. Motion is DENIED as to the cause of action for Breach of Warranty of Quiet Enjoyment. This cause of action is in part based on events occurring "during the court of Plaintiff's tenancy" (independent from the OMI) and therefore is not barred by the 1-year SOL.= (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: LUISA HANSON VS. GERARDO C. SEGARRA ET AL

Verifications have been provided. Requests for sanctions are denied.= (501/LOT)
